scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @aegisplane/backend" "npm run dev:worker --workspace @aegisplane/backend" "npm run dev --workspace @aegisplane/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @aegisplane/backend && npm run build --workspace @aegisplane/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @aegisplane/backend && npm run lint --workspace @aegisplane/web
